steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: The passage contrasts elements isolated quickly (like phosphorus) with those where “this wasn't the case”—meaning isolation wasn't quick. The blank must explain what happened in that second group.

steps.title: Show the typical pattern
steps.content: ”Often” directly shows that in cases where isolation wasn't quick, the process frequently took years. Even so, similarly, and furthermore either contradict the contrast, blur the logic, or merely add information. This matches choice D — D is correct.
